evals.prompt: Show me a walkthrough of how the feedback flow works. I want to understand the complete process before I start using it on my project.
evals.expected_output: The examples skill presents the feedback-flow scenario walkthrough, showing the complete 8-step process from invoking feedback to noting child projects that should merge.
expectations: References or presents the feedback-flow scenario from the examples skill
Shows the complete flow: invoke → identify → read stack.json → locate parent → apply fix → LEARNINGS.md → commit → note children
Includes concrete examples of what happens at each step
